perturbation.original_text:
Definitions:
SOFTWARE PC QUOTE 6.0-TM- for Windows on the Internet is a software application that displays market data information, provided via the digital Hyperfeed, in the form of quotes, charts, graphs, tables, board views, tickers and other analytical tools.
HYPERFEED The PC Quote proprietary digital data feed transmitted via satellite, land line, or Internet with advanced compression technology, containing financial market information obtained by PCQ from the institutions and exchanges listed in Section 5 of this Agreement. This market data includes stock quotes, futures and options trading, commodities, and other related information.
perturbation.changed_text:
Definitions:
SOFTWARE PC QUOTE 6.0-TM- for Windows on the Internet is a software application.
HYPERFEED The PC Quote proprietary digital data feed transmitted via satellite, land line, or Internet with advanced compression technology, containing financial market information.
perturbation.explanation: The original text clearly defines 'SOFTWARE' as displaying market data via 'Hyperfeed' and precisely describes 'Hyperfeed' including the sources and types of data. The modified version omits critical details, creating ambiguity on the exact functionality of SOFTWARE and what the HYPERFEED contains. This change introduces uncertainty in later clauses referencing the SOFTWARE and HYPERFEED, specifically in the Section 5 of this agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text:
Exchange Authorization
A. The ABW hereby acknowledges and agrees that the HYPERFEED provided under this Agreement contains market information obtained, selected and consolidated by PCQ under the authority of various agencies, including but not limited to, the New York Stock Exchange, American Stock Exchange, Pacific Stock Exchange, Midwest Stock Exchange, Chicago Board Options Exchange, the Options Price Reporting Authority, the Consolidated Tape Association, Chicago Board of Trade, Chicago Mercantile Exchange/International Monetary Market, Kansas City Board of Trade, Minneapolis Grain Exchange, Commodities Exchange Center, New York Futures Exchange, Mid-America Commodity Exchange, and Consolidated Canadian Group and that the ABW's use of the service for internal or external redistribution of date is authorized and regulated by said agencies.
perturbation.justification: The original text defines SOFTWARE as displaying market data via 'Hyperfeed,' specifying the data's sources and types (e.g., stock quotes, futures). The changed text omits these details, creating ambiguity. The contradicted text explicitly states that 'HYPERFEED' contains market information from specific agencies like the New York Stock Exchange and that the ABW's use is regulated by those agencies. By removing the details about data sources from the definition of 'HYPERFEED,' the modified text contradicts the contradicted text, as it's no longer clear what data the 'HYPERFEED' contains and which agencies authorize its use, thus creating a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text:
3. Payment For Service
A. Beginning with the date specified on the fee schedule attached hereto as Schedule A, or upon completion of the Installation and testing of all equipment and services, which ever is later. ABW will commence payment of a monthly fee for the right to permit access by ABW's clients to said SOFTWARE and HYPERFEED.
B. The charges for the services set forth in this Agreement shall be invoiced monthly. ABW agrees to pay said charges within thirty (30) days of the monthly invoice date. ABW may issue a purchase order for billing purposes. The invoices must reference that purchase order number and be sent to the "Bill To" address stated on the purchase order. The terms of this negotiated Agreement shall supercede those contained on that purchase order.
C. All payments will be made in US Dollars drawn on a US bank. ABW will provide a complete list of all clients using the format described in Schedule B with each payment.
D. Any payments which have not been received by PCQ within thirty (30) days of the Invoice date shall be subject to a FINANCE CHARGE of 1.0% per month which is a corresponding ANNUAL PERCENTAGE RATE of 12% on the outstanding balance.
F. Any invoice submitted by PCQ shall be deemed correct unless ABW advises PCQ in writing, within thirty (30) days of the receipt of the invoice, that it disagrees with the invoice and specifies the nature of the disagreement.
G. Any sales, use, excise, value added and local property taxes will be payable by ABW should such taxes be applicable.
H. In the event that any invoice is not paid by ABW within forty-five (45) days after receipt, and when no discrepancy issues have been identified by ABW which are in some stage of resolution, after giving notice to ABW, PCQ may terminate this agreement and ABW's access to and use of SOFTWARE and HYPERFEED provided hereunder unless ABW pays such invoice prior to the termination date Source: PCQUOTE COM INC, S-1/A, 7/21/1999 specified in the Termination Notice. The remedies contained herein are cumulative and are in addition to all other rights and remedies available to PCQ under this Agreement, by operation of law, or otherwise.
I. Upon termination as provided for in this Agreement, ABW will pay all charges for services and fees for the entire month in which that termination becomes effective.
perturbation.changed_text:
3. Payment For Service
A. Beginning with the date specified on the fee schedule, or upon completion of the Installation and testing of all equipment and services, which ever is later. ABW will commence payment of a monthly fee.
B. The charges for the services set forth in this Agreement shall be invoiced monthly. ABW agrees to pay said charges. ABW may issue a purchase order for billing purposes. The invoices must reference that purchase order number and be sent to the "Bill To" address stated on the purchase order. The terms of this negotiated Agreement shall supercede those contained on that purchase order.
C. All payments will be made in US Dollars drawn on a US bank.
D. Any payments which have not been received by PCQ within thirty (30) days of the Invoice date shall be subject to a FINANCE CHARGE.
F. Any invoice submitted by PCQ shall be deemed correct unless ABW advises PCQ in writing that it disagrees with the invoice and specifies the nature of the disagreement.
G. Any sales, use, excise, value added and local property taxes will be payable by ABW should such taxes be applicable.
H. In the event that any invoice is not paid by ABW after receipt, and when no discrepancy issues have been identified by ABW which are in some stage of resolution, after giving notice to ABW, PCQ may terminate this agreement and ABW's access to and use of SOFTWARE and HYPERFEED provided hereunder unless ABW pays such invoice prior to the termination date specified in the Termination Notice. The remedies contained herein are cumulative and are in addition to all other rights and remedies available to PCQ under this Agreement, by operation of law, or otherwise.
I. Upon termination as provided for in this Agreement, ABW will pay all charges for services and fees for the entire month in which that termination becomes effective.
perturbation.explanation: By omitting the specific details regarding 'Schedule A' and 'Schedule B', which are integral to defining the pricing and client list format. The omission of the ANNUAL PERCENTAGE RATE introduces ambiguity on how much will be the FINANCING CHARGE will be charged. This introduces uncertainty in financial obligations. The fact that the schedule A and schedule B have been omitted, contradicts in the definition section, where the terms of software and hyperfeed where define, which affects section 3 where they are mentioned
perturbation.contradicted_text:
Definitions:
SOFTWARE PC QUOTE 6.0-TM- for Windows on the Internet is a software application.
HYPERFEED The PC Quote proprietary digital data feed transmitted via satellite, land line, or Internet with advanced compression technology, containing financial market information.
perturbation.justification: The omission of 'Schedule A' and 'Schedule B' (from Section 3A and 3C in the original text) directly contradicts the definitions of 'SOFTWARE' and 'HYPERFEED' (in the Contradicted Text), because these schedules were previously integral to defining pricing and client list format, and are now undefined, affecting the payment terms for the defined services. The removal of the ANNUAL PERCENTAGE RATE also makes the FINANCE CHARGE ambiguous, creating an inconsistency.

perturbation.original_text: C. PCQ acknowledges the confidential nature of ABW's use of the SOFTWARE and HYPERFEED during the initial term of this agreement. Due to the unannounced platform on which ABW shall make available its electronic service to its client during this initial term, PCQ shall in no way disclose to other parties the substance nor acknowledge the existence of this agreement. Any advertising or disclosure of the relationship between the parties, use of either's marks, names or reference by the other shall be approved by both parties prior to release.
perturbation.changed_text: C. PCQ acknowledges the confidential nature of ABW's use during the initial term of this agreement. Due to the unannounced platform on which ABW shall make available its electronic service to its client during this initial term, PCQ shall in no way disclose to other parties the substance nor acknowledge the existence of this agreement. Any advertising or disclosure of the relationship between the parties, use of either's marks, names or reference by the other shall be approved by both parties prior to release.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the direct reference to 'SOFTWARE' and 'HYPERFEED', this section loses its specificity regarding what information is considered confidential. This weakens the confidentiality clause and contradicts sections where the SOFTWARE and HYPERFEED are discussed as key components of the agreement. Although not directly stated, this change creates a contradiction because the definition section does not explicitly outlines what constitutes the confidentiality.
perturbation.contradicted_text:
Confidentiality of Proprietary Information
A. ABW understands and acknowledges the proprietary nature of the HYPERFEED and SOFTWARE provided by PCQ and that said HYPERFEED and SOFTWARE have been developed as a trade secret of PCQ and at its expense. ABW agrees to hold said information in the same manner as ABW deals with its own proprietary information and trade secrets. Furthermore, ABW agrees not to attempt any reverse engineering of the HYPERFEED to decode the signals used by PCQ in transmitting the information.
B. PCQ understands the proprietary nature of any information belonging to ABW, and recognizes the harm that can be occasioned to user by disclosure of information relative to ABW's activities, PCQ agrees to hold such information in the same manner as PCQ deals with its own proprietary information and trade secrets.
C. PCQ acknowledges the confidential nature of ABW's use during the initial term of this agreement. Due to the unannounced platform on which ABW shall make available its electronic service to its client during this initial term, PCQ shall in no way disclose to other parties the substance nor acknowledge the existence of this agreement. Any advertising or disclosure of the relationship between the parties, use of either's marks, names or reference by the other shall be approved by both parties prior to release.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly references 'SOFTWARE' and 'HYPERFEED' as confidential aspects of ABW's use. By removing these specific references in the changed text, the confidentiality clause becomes less defined and creates a strong conflict with the contradicted text, where these items are specifically identified and protected as proprietary information. The changed text weakens the protection of 'SOFTWARE' and 'HYPERFEED', leading to a clear in-text contradiction. The confidentiality is no longer directly linked to the SOFTWARE and HYPERFEED.
